---
title: "Proof status"
---

This page is generated by qmd-prover from the project's semantic QMD. Local verification is conditional on direct dependency statements; global status is computed from the complete dependency closure.

| Result | Local AI | Global | Refutation evidence | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| @def-canonical-term-model | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/semantics.qmd:109` |
| @def-consistency | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/calculus.qmd:70` |
| @def-fol-formulas | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/foundations.qmd:23` |
| @def-fol-signature | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/foundations.qmd:5` |
| @def-fol-structure | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/semantics.qmd:20` |
| @def-fol-substitution | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/foundations.qmd:39` |
| @def-fol-terms | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/foundations.qmd:14` |
| @def-henkin-theory | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/semantics.qmd:84` |
| @def-hilbert-calculus | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/calculus.qmd:14` |
| @def-language-translation | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/foundations.qmd:83` |
| @def-satisfaction | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/semantics.qmd:40` |
| @def-term-value | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/semantics.qmd:29` |
| @lem-canonical-truth | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/semantics.qmd:162` |
| @lem-chain-union-consistent | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/calculus.qmd:100` |
| @lem-complete-theory-boolean | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/calculus.qmd:139` |
| @lem-consistency-characterizations | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/calculus.qmd:78` |
| @lem-constant-elimination | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/calculus.qmd:154` |
| @lem-deduction | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/calculus.qmd:51` |
| @lem-equality-congruence | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/semantics.qmd:91` |
| @lem-existential-membership | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/semantics.qmd:144` |
| @lem-fresh-variable | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/foundations.qmd:49` |
| @lem-henkin-witness-consistency | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/calculus.qmd:177` |
| @lem-henkinization | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/henkin.qmd:38` |
| @lem-maximal-consistent | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/calculus.qmd:114` |
| @lem-proof-finitary | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/calculus.qmd:40` |
| @lem-pure-language-extension | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/henkin.qmd:24` |
| @lem-reduct-satisfaction | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/semantics.qmd:197` |
| @lem-semantic-substitution | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/semantics.qmd:62` |
| @lem-substitution-composition | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/foundations.qmd:61` |
| @lem-term-model-evaluation | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/semantics.qmd:126` |
| @thm-consistent-model | not-run | unverified | — | `workspace/henkin.qmd:78` |
| @thm-main-godel-completeness | not-run | unverified | — | `completeness.qmd:5` |

## Dependency graph

![Proof dependency graph](dependencies.svg){fig-alt="A directed graph from results to the definitions and results cited by their proofs."}
